name: web-scaffold
description: Agentic web project scaffolding on incubation architecture standards — discover idea, pick lightest credible golden path (landing / full-stack / internal tool / API service), approve ADR, scaffold via official scaffolders (stubs only, zero feature code — feature work happens inside generated project), verify structurally against decision standard. Cloudflare-default; full-stack paths scaffold a Turborepo monorepo (apps/web + apps/api + packages/db). Strict structure contract + guard hooks enforced in generated projects.
